title: The Environmental Protection (Plastic Straws, Cotton Buds and Stirrers) (England) Regulations 2020: post implementation review
body: "Review of the Environmental Protection (Plastic Straws, Cotton Buds and Stirrers) (England) Regulations 2020 after 5 years.  This report combines the required reviews of the enforcement and civil sanctions provisions and the regulatory provisions of the Regulations.  It presents the evidence and findings of a post implementation review (PIR) for The Environmental Protection (Plastic Straws, Cotton Buds and Stirrers) (England) Regulations 2020. "
